ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Team ID representing the player's current team */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Guard, Forward) */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the basketball team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League to which the team belongs */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Arena where the team plays home games */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Start and end time of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Home team ID */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Away team ID */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the game took place */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "referee_ids" TEXT /* IDs of referees officiating the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's stats entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the stats belong to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose stats are recorded */,
  "min" REAL /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "pts" REAL /* Points scored by the player */,
  "fgm_a" TEXT /* Field Goals Made - Attempts */,
  "three_pm_a" TEXT /* Three-Pointers Made - Attempts */,
  "ftm_a" TEXT /* Free Throws Made - Attempts */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Rebounds */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal Fouls */,
  "eff_rating" REAL /* Efficiency rating of the player */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* Plus/Minus rating of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2023-24) */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of the season (e.g., Regular, Playoffs) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., NBA, EuroLeague) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "years_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience the coach has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game result */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being recorded */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "winner_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_points" (
  "fantasy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy points entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Calculated fantasy points for the player's performance in the game */,
  "position_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player by position in fantasy scoring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_points_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_points_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player comparison */,
  "player1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first player in the comparison */,
  "player2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second player in the comparison */,
  "comparison_metric" TEXT /* Metric used for comparison (e.g., points, assists) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the comparison metric */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_comparisons_player2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_comparisons_player1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
